info.description: Footer at the bottom of every page — closing message, link columns, legal, Substack CTA.

closing_message.default: You don't have to hold everything.
closing_message.description: The italic line at the top of the footer.

explore_links.description: First row of footer links (editorial sections).

connect_links.description: Second row of footer links (work / shop / community / about).

legal_links.description: Small legal links at the bottom (Press, Privacy, Terms).

substack_cta_label.description: Label on the Substack CTA button at the bottom of the footer.

substack_cta_url.description: Where the Substack CTA button links to.
